instruction:
You are an Expert DevOps Engineer specializing in Travis CI to GitHub Actions migrations. Migrate this Travis CI config to a COMPLETE GitHub Actions workflow.

OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose). Your output MUST start with "name:" and include top-level keys: name, on, jobs.
- Include at least one job with: runs-on, steps.
- Do NOT output a snippet (must not start with "- uses:" or "- run:").

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map Travis lifecycle to GHA steps: before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy.
- Map matrices: jdk/node_js/python/go -> strategy.matrix; allow_failures -> continue-on-error.
- Env: env.global -> env (workflow/job/step). $FOO secrets -> ${{ secrets.FOO }}.
- Caches: cache: directories -> actions/cache@v4 with stable keys.
- Services/addons: services (dbs) -> jobs.<job>.services; addons.apt -> apt-get steps.
- Docker/Compose: preserve docker build/push and docker-compose up/down; keep wait loops verbatim.
- Triggers: preserve original branch/tag names; do not invent "main" or "master".
- Use modern actions: actions/checkout@v4; actions/setup-java@v4 (distribution: temurin), setup-node@v4, setup-python@v5, setup-go@v5.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.
- Do not leave empty event mappings.
- If branch/tag filters are required, switch to the expanded form for that event only.


Now migrate below input section Travis CI configuration to equivalent complete GitHub Actions workflow and return ONLY the complete migrated YAML maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
if: branch = master

language: android
sudo: false

env:
  global:
  - secure: 
  - secure: 

android:
  components:
  - tools
  - build-tools-28.0.3
  - android-29

before_install:
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
  - stage: test
    script:
    - ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace

  - stage: deploy
    if: branch = master AND type = push
    script:
    - git fetch --unshallow # Build number will be incorrect for shallow copy
    - ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace
output:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

env:
  SECRET_1: 
  SECRET_2: 

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
          yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Publish sample
        run: ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

    branches:
      - master
      - "2.13"
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - "2.13"

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -B clean verify

input:
language: java

branches:
  only:
    - master
    #tag xx.yy-zz or xx.yy.zz-anythinglikeexperimental
    - /^\d+\.\d+(\.\d+)?(-\S*)?$/
    #hotfix branches (not being too strict on purpose)
    - /^hf-.*$/

script:
  - mvn test -B
  - mvn pitmp:run

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: deploy/deploy.sh
  on:
    tags: true
output:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - 'hf-*'
    tags:
      - '*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Test
      run: mvn test -B

    - name: PIT
      run: mvn pitmp:run

    - name: After success
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

    - name: Deploy
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: deploy/deploy.sh

input:
language: java
sudo: false
jdk:
- openjdk8

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "growthcraftce"
    token:
      secure: "0dff37f87344985cef77db78d7736b3792bfbdc1"

before_cache:
- rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
  - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
  - $HOME/.sonar/cache
  - $HOME/.m2/repositor
  - .gradle

before_install:
- ruby --version
- chmod +x ./gradlew

install: ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S

script:
- ./gradlew build
- ./gradlew sonarqube
- ls -la build/libs
    # Deploy the artifacts back to GitHub
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key: $GITHUB_OAUTH
  file_glob: true
  file:
  - "checksums.txt"
  - "build/libs/growthcraft-*.jar"
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    tags: true
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
            ~/.sonar/cache
            ~/.m2/repository
            .gradle
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Check Ruby version
        run: ruby --version
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x ./gradlew
      - name: Setup CI workspace
        run: ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S
      - name: Build
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Run SonarQube analysis
        run: ./gradlew sonarqube
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: growthcraftce
      - name: List build artifacts
        run: ls -la build/libs
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
      - name: Create release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          files: |
            checksums.txt
            build/libs/growthcraft-*.jar
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
env:
  - TEST_DIR=code/ingest
script: cd $TEST_DIR &&  gradle jacocoTestReport
before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
test:
    post:
        - if [ -e ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew jacocoTestReport;else gradle jacocoTestReport;fi
        - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t uuid-repo-token
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  TEST_DIR: code/ingest

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests and generate coverage
        run: cd $TEST_DIR && gradle jacocoTestReport
      - name: Generate additional coverage report
        run: if [ -e ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew jacocoTestReport;else gradle jacocoTestReport;fi
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t uuid-repo-token
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  - chmod +x kubectl
  - sudo ln -s $(pwd)/kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl
  - wget https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube/releases/download/v0.28.2/minikube-linux-amd64 -q -O minikube
  - chmod +x minikube

  - sudo minikube start --vm-driver=none --bootstrapper=localkube
  - ../scripts/travisTest.sh
branches:
  only: 
  - master
  - qa
output:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - qa
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - qa

env:
  CHANGE_MINIKUBE_NONE_USER: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Unset Java options
        run: unset _JAVA_OPTIONS
      - name: Prepare test script
        run: |
          cd finish
          chmod +x ../scripts/travisTest.sh
      - name: Setup shared mount
        run: sudo mount --make-rshared /
      - name: Install kubectl
        run: |
          curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/$(curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl
          chmod +x kubectl
          sudo ln -s $(pwd)/kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl
      - name: Install minikube
        run: |
          wget https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube/releases/download/v0.28.2/minikube-linux-amd64 -q -O minikube
          chmod +x minikube
          sudo ln -s $(pwd)/minikube /usr/local/bin/minikube
      - name: Start minikube
        run: sudo minikube start --vm-driver=none --bootstrapper=localkube
      - name: Run tests
        run: cd finish && ../scripts/travisTest.sh

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - openjdk8
os:
  - linux
sudo: required

before_install:
  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
  - echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt
before_deploy:
  - git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
  - git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
  - git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
  - git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key: $GIT_TOKEN
  skip_cleanup: true
  file_glob: true
  file: $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/build/libs/*
  on:
    repo: PepperLola/playerinfo
    prerelease: true
if: tag IS blank

script:
  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew :test
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    if: "!startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
        echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt

    - name: Script
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew :test

    - name: Before deploy
      run: |
        git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
        git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
        git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
        git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags

    - name: Deploy
      if: github.repository == 'PepperLola/playerinfo'
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ env.TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER }}
        files: ${{ github.workspace }}/build/libs/*
        prerelease: true

input:
language: java
sudo: false
install: true

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "radixdlt-github"
    token: ${SONAR_TOKEN}

jdk:
  - openjdk11

git:
  depth: false

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: check
      script: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info --refresh-dependencies
    - stage: integration
      script: ./gradlew integrationTest --refresh-dependencies

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - '$HOME/.m2/repository'
    - '$HOME/.sonar/cache'
    - '$HOME/.gradle'
    - '.gradle'

env:
  - TEST_DURATION=30s
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TEST_DURATION: 30s
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.sonar/cache
          ~/.gradle
          ./.gradle
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', '**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-
    - name: Run check
      run: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info --refresh-dependencies
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  integration:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TEST_DURATION: 30s
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.sonar/cache
          ~/.gradle
          ./.gradle
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', '**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-
    - name: Run integration tests
      run: ./gradlew integrationTest --refresh-dependencies
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

input:
language: java

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
  - openjdk7

before_install:
  - echo "Downloading Maven 3.2.5"
   && wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.2.5/binaries/apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
   && unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
   && export M2_HOME=$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5
   && export PATH=$M2_HOME/bin:$PATH
   && cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
   && mvn -version

install:
  - mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V

script:
  - sh ./.middleware-common/check_format.sh
  - mvn cobertura:cobertura

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '7']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Download and setup Maven 3.2.5
        run: |
          echo "Downloading Maven 3.2.5"
          wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.2.5/binaries/apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          echo "$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
          cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          $PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin/mvn -version
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
      - name: Check format
        run: sh ./.middleware-common/check_format.sh
      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: mvn cobertura:cobertura
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
